story.title: 创建个人 Agent
story.narrative: 用户首次使用 BridgeAI，创建自己的 AI Agent，配置基本信息和偏好。

api_verification_blocked.reason: DDoS protection middleware with 30s timeout blocks all POST/PUT/DELETE requests to /api/v1/* endpoints from localhost. Health endpoint (/health) works fine.
api_verification_blocked.evidence: Server log shows: [DDoS Protection] Slow request timeout from 127.0.0.1, [Performance] Slow request: POST /api/v1/auth/login took 30001ms
api_verification_blocked.mitigation: Code review and database schema analysis used as alternative verification method

ac_verification_by_code_review.evidence: POST / endpoint with authenticate middleware, createAgentSchema validates type (enum, required) and name (1-100 chars, required)

AgentType enum: VISIONSHARE, AGENTDATE, AGENTJOB, AGENTAD, DEMAND, SUPPLY. Mobile UI only shows 4 (DEMAND/SUPPLY excluded per NP-272). DB has 3 types in use: VISIONSHARE(47), AGENTDATE(1), AGENTJOB(1)
AgentStatus enum: DRAFT, ACTIVE, PAUSED, ARCHIVED. VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS defined. DB shows 3 statuses in use: DRAFT(2), ACTIVE(46), ARCHIVED(1). agent_status_history table exists with 6 entries.
GET / endpoint with type/status filters and pagination support in agentService.getAgents()

ac_verification_by_code_review.description: Agent 管理 UI (5步向导/列表页/空状态)
ac_verification_by_code_review.evidence: CreateAgentScreen.tsx has 5-step wizard with progress bar (step/5*100%). AgentListScreen.tsx has empty state (No Agents Yet), create button, agent cards with type/status badges, toggle button, filters, sort, grid/list view. All testIDs present.

ac_verification_by_code_review.description: 注销特定场景 Agent (soft delete)
ac_verification_by_code_review.evidence: deleteAgent() sets status=ARCHIVED, isActive=false, creates statusHistory entry. Pre-checks: agent exists (404), ownership (403), active matches (409). Config field stores {communicationStyle} on one archived agent.

Profile auto-created on agent creation (empty L1/L2/L3). generateAgentPersonality(type) generates hardcoded traits per AgentType (e.g., VISIONSHARE→['地理敏感','价格敏锐','视觉导向']/'friendly'). Stored in agent.config.personality. NOT dynamically reading master profile.

ac_verification_by_code_review.description: 用户信息接口 (GET/PUT /me, POST /avatar, DELETE /me)
ac_verification_by_code_review.evidence: GET /me returns user. PUT /me updates name/displayName/bio/website/location. POST /avatar accepts multipart file (5MB limit, jpeg/png/gif/webp) or avatarUrl field. DELETE /me requires password verification first.

ac_verification_by_code_review.description: 隐私控制 (资料可见性/在线状态/联系方式/阻止列表)
ac_verification_by_code_review.evidence: PrivacySettingsScreen.tsx with sections: profileVisibility(public/friends/private), onlineStatusVisibility, phoneVisibility, emailVisibility, allowSearchByPhone/Email, blocked list. Users table has privacy_settings jsonb column (currently empty in DB).

ac_verification_by_code_review.description: 头像管理 (上传/压缩/云存储)
ac_verification_by_code_review.evidence: POST /avatar uses multer memoryStorage, storageService.uploadAvatar. Image compression/裁剪 not visible in code review - requires runtime testing. User table has avatar_url text column.
ProfileScreen and EditProfileScreen referenced in AC verification_method. Mobile app uses Expo with React Native.
ac_verification_by_code_review.note: UI verification requires Expo Go - web version broken

ac_verification_by_code_review.evidence: packages/shared/src/types/scene.ts defines comprehensive type system: SceneId('visionshare'|'agentdate'|'agentjob'|'agentad'), SceneMetadata, SceneConfig with fields[], capabilities[], templates[], validation, ui. 17 SceneFieldType options.
FieldValidationRule, FieldDependency, FieldUIConfig defined. SceneConfig includes validation and ui properties.
SceneTemplate type defined with preset and user templates. server has templateService.
SceneCapability type defined with id, dependencies, config. 4 scene capabilities in DB.
SceneMigration type defined with field mappings and transformations. Route has /migration/validate, /migration/preview, /migration/execute.
SceneConfig includes SceneUIConfig with sections, layout, theme. Mobile CreateAgentScreen Step 3 shows SceneConfigForm.

screenshot_evidence.description: Web homepage - shows blank white screen due to metro bundler @babel/runtime error
Web homepage after 5s wait - same blank

blockers.mitigation: Code review of React Native source as alternative

blockers.issue: API endpoints blocked by DDoS middleware
blockers.reason: slowAttackProtection middleware with 30s timeout - all POST/PUT/DELETE to /api/v1/* from 127.0.0.1 hang and return 408
blockers.mitigation: Code review of API routes + schema analysis

blockers.issue: Mobile app requires Expo Go physical device or simulator
blockers.reason: React Native app cannot run in web browser (requires native build)
blockers.impact: Cannot verify mobile-specific features (avatar upload via camera, permissions)
